alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds a sulfenyl group with the general formula RS (R = organyl).
alternative_parents.name: Sulfenyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds containing a thioether group that is substituted by two alkyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylthioethers

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing either the monothiacetal functional group (R2C(OR')(SR')) or the dithioacetal (R2C(SR')2) functional group .
class.name: Thioacetals

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as dithioketals. These are compounds containing a dithioketal functional group with the general structure R2C(SR')2 with R, R' = organyl.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing a dithioketal functional group with the general structure R2C(SR')2 with R, R' = organyl.
direct_parent.name: Dithioketals

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds containing a dithioacetal functional group with the general structure R2C(SR')2.
subclass.name: Dithioacetals

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a carbon-sulfur bond.
superclass.name: Organosulfur compounds
